allow: Bash(git remote:*)
Bash(git init:*)
Bash(git add:*)
Bash(npx vercel:*)
Bash(git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Bash(git add .gitignore && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add .vercel to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/styles/global.css public/styles/global.css README.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Revert to dark color scheme; document palette in README

Restore original colors \(#0a0a0a bg, warm white text, gold accent\).
Replace boilerplate README with project-specific docs including
full color token table and deployment instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)
Bash(grep:*)
Bash(find:*)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Rename Work→Case Files and Writing→Operating Playbooks

- Rename page directories: /work → /case-files, /writing → /operating-playbooks
- Update all nav labels, page titles, h1s, back-links, and hrefs
- Fix Series 2 duplicate on homepage \(unflag Change Injection from featured\)
- Fix series sort order to S1 → S2 → S3 on both homepage and playbooks page
- Remove logo from nav, add plain Home link; logo stays on homepage hero only
- Homepage hero: two-column layout with logo on the right

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)
Bash(npm i:*)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Vercel Analytics

Install @vercel/analytics and inject <Analytics /> into both
Base and Article layouts to track all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Bash(git pull:*)

Bash(git add src/content/work/architecture-governance.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Refine Phase 2 document list and result wording

repo for the full list. Replace explicit count with canonical
cross-stack phrasing in Scale at Entry and Result.

EOF

Bash(git add src/layouts/Article.astro src/pages/case-files/[slug].astro src/pages/operating-playbooks/[slug].astro && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Remove duplicate title and read time from article pages

Drop the layout-rendered h1 \(duplicated the markdown H1\) and the
read time calculation entirely. For operating playbooks, keep the
series label as the only article-header content; skip the header
block entirely for case files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Series 1: "Constraint to Scale" → "Foundations"
Series 2: "Operating Under Pressure" → "Judgement"
Series 3: "AI-Native" → "AI Native"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

for every page across the site.

EOF
